name: wifi-management
description: Monitor, analyze, and optimize WiFi networks and client connections. Track signal strength, analyze channel usage, and optimize band distribution.
capabilities: List all WiFi networks with security and status details
Track connected client devices and signal strength metrics
Analyze channel usage and identify interference patterns
Monitor access point performance and load distribution
Review band distribution between 2.4GHz and 5GHz networks
Generate optimization recommendations for WiFi infrastructure
author: DataKnifeAI
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill with no executable code. Static findings are false positives: markdown backticks (code formatting) were misidentified as shell execution; WPA2/WPA3 protocol names were misidentified as weak crypto; source URL metadata is legitimate. No security risks present.
valueStatement: Managing WiFi networks requires constant monitoring of multiple access points, client devices, and channel configurations. This skill provides unified access to UniFi network data, enabling quick analysis and optimization recommendations without switching between management interfaces.
userTitle: Monitor and Optimize UniFi WiFi Networks
limitations: Requires UniFi Network API access credentials
Cannot modify network configuration, read-only access only
Does not support non-UniFi network hardware

useCases.title: Network Health Dashboard
useCases.description: Quickly assess overall WiFi network status across all access points and identify issues requiring attention.

useCases.title: Client Connectivity Issues
useCases.description: Diagnose WiFi connectivity problems by analyzing signal strength and band distribution for specific clients.

useCases.title: Capacity Planning Reports
useCases.description: Review client distribution patterns and access point load to plan infrastructure upgrades and expansions.

promptTemplates.title: List All Networks
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me all WiFi networks in my UniFi deployment with their security settings and status.

promptTemplates.title: Signal Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Which WiFi clients have signal strength below -70 dBm and may need attention.

promptTemplates.title: Band Distribution
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me the distribution of clients across 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands. Are any bands overloaded?

promptTemplates.title: Optimization Plan
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze channel utilization and band distribution. Suggest specific optimizations to improve overall WiFi performance.

bestPractices: Monitor band distribution regularly to ensure balanced client load across 2.4GHz and 5GHz frequencies.
Track signal strength trends over time to identify coverage gaps before users report connectivity issues.
Review channel utilization weekly to optimize access point placement and reduce interference from neighboring networks.
antiPatterns: Ignoring clients with consistently poor signal strength instead of investigating root causes.
Making channel changes without reviewing historical utilization data and neighbor network activity.
Allowing all devices to connect to 2.4GHz without band steering, causing congestion on the crowded frequency.

faq.question: What UniFi devices are supported?
faq.answer: Works with UniFi Network installations using UniFi Controller 6.x or later with API access enabled.

faq.question: How many access points can this skill monitor?
faq.answer: The skill can monitor all access points configured in your UniFi controller without specific limits.

faq.question: Does this skill modify network settings?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides read-only access to network data for monitoring and analysis purposes only.

faq.question: Is my network data sent anywhere?
faq.answer: All data stays within your environment. The skill only queries your UniFi API locally or through your controller.

faq.question: Why are some client statistics unavailable?
faq.answer: Clients must have recent network activity to appear in statistics. Dormant clients may show limited metrics.

faq.question: How does this compare to the UniFi mobile app?
faq.answer: This skill provides programmatic access for automated monitoring and faster troubleshooting workflows in AI conversations.
